schedule.method:
1. Sweep to remove dirt.
2. Clean & sanitize the door handle.
3. Clean & sanitize stainless-steel shelves.
4. Mop floor using GP cleaner, then water, dry.
Deep clean:
1) Shift food to another chiller if >4h.
2) Switch off power.
3) Remove/wipe plastic curtains & sanitize.
4) Clean floor & wall with GP cleaner.
5) Clean/sanitize handle & shelves.
6) Mop as above.
7) Turn on power until ≥5°C, return food.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, brush, mop & bucket, scouring pad, clean cloth.
BH20 general purpose cleaner (30 ml in 600 ml water), contact time 2–3 minutes, rinse with water, dry.
BH30 sanitizer (200–500 ppm), contact time 2–3 minutes, then wipe with clean tissue/cloth, air dry.

schedule.method:
1. Remove the strips from the door.
2. Scrub & wash using GP cleaner.
3. Rinse with water & air dry.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, scouring pad, brush.
BH20 general purpose cleaner (30 ml in 600 ml water), contact time 2–3 minutes, rinse with water, dry.

schedule.method:
Daily:
1. Clean & disinfect racks & inside with sanitizer (remove food first).
2. Sanitize exterior incl. handle & gasket.
Deep clean:
1) Shift food if deep clean >4h.
2) Switch off & remove racks.
3) Wash racks with soap; rinse & sanitize.
4) Sanitize interior & exterior; power on to ≤5°C.
5) Return food.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, tissue, brush, scouring pad.
BH34/BH35 Manual Pot Wash (30 ml/L), rinse with water, air dry.
BH30 sanitizer (200–500 ppm), contact time 2–3 minutes, wipe, air dry.

schedule.method:
1. Remove food items.
2. Clean & disinfect display area, inside, racks, door, handle, gasket.
3. Wipe dry & return food.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, tissue, scouring pad.
BH30 sanitizer (200–500 ppm), contact time 2–3 minutes, wipe, air dry.

schedule.method:
1. Switch off & cool.
2. Remove food particles.
3. Clean & disinfect; wipe dry.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, tissue, scouring pad.
BH30 sanitizer (200–500 ppm), contact time 2–3 minutes, wipe, air dry.

schedule.method:
1. Remove garbage & rinse inside.
2. Scrub interior & exterior; wash.
3. Rinse & dry; place polyethylene liner.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, face mask, long-handled brush.
BH20 general purpose cleaner (30 ml in 600 ml water), contact time 2–3 minutes, wipe.

schedule.method:
1. Wipe cabinet.
2. Clean & disinfect inside & outside.
3. Wipe dry.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, tissue.
BH30 sanitizer (200–500 ppm), contact time 2–3 minutes, wipe, air dry.

schedule.method:
1. Shift food to another freezer.
2. Switch off power; remove racks.
3. Wash racks; rinse & sanitize.
4. Remove accumulated ice.
5. Sanitize interior & exterior incl. handle.
6. Power on to ≤ -18°C; return food.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, tissue, brush, scouring pad.
BH34/BH35 Manual Pot Wash (30 ml/L), rinse, air dry.
BH30 sanitizer (200–500 ppm), contact 2–3 m, wipe, air dry.

schedule.method:
1. Unplug & let oil cool.
2. Drain oil (store/dispose properly).
3. Remove frying basket; scrub with degreaser; rinse & dry.
4. Wipe exterior to remove oil residue; use scrapper if needed.
5. Degrease heating element.
6. Scrub interior with degreaser; rinse till soap-free.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, towel, scrapper, scouring pad, tissue.
BH32 Degreaser (2–5 min), rinse.

schedule.method:
As necessary:
1. Unplug; remove food particles; spray sanitizer; wipe.
End of day:
1. Unplug; dismantle (die plate, blade set...)
2. Wash parts with soap & water; scrub inside mouth.
3. Rinse & sanitize; dry.
4. Clean & disinfect body; wipe.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, scouring pad, tissue.
BH34/BH35 Manual Pot Wash (30 ml/L), rinse, air dry.
BH30 sanitizer (200–500 ppm), contact 2–3 m, wipe, air dry.

payload.standard: Free of dirt, grease, and food debris

schedule.method:
1. Sweep to remove dirt.
2. Clean & sanitize the door handle.
3. Clean & sanitize stainless-steel shelves.
4. Mop floor using GP cleaner, then water, dry.
Deep clean:
1) Shift food to another chiller if >4h.
2) Switch off power.
3) Remove/wipe plastic curtains & sanitize.
4) Clean floor & wall with GP cleaner.
5) Clean/sanitize handle & shelves.
6) Mop as above.
7) Turn on power until ≥5°C, return food.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, brush, mop & bucket, scouring pad, clean cloth.
BH20 general purpose cleaner (30 ml in 600 ml water), contact time 2–3 minutes, rinse with water, dry.
BH30 sanitizer (200–500 ppm), contact time 2–3 minutes, then wipe with clean tissue/cloth, air dry.

schedule.method:

schedule.equipment:

schedule.method:
Daily:
1. Clean & disinfect racks & inside with sanitizer (remove food first).
2. Sanitize exterior incl. handle & gasket.
Deep clean:
1) Shift food if deep clean >4h.
2) Switch off & remove racks.
3) Wash racks with soap; rinse & sanitize.
4) Sanitize interior & exterior; power on to ≤5°C.
5) Return food.
schedule.equipment:
Gloves, tissue, brush, scouring pad.
BH34/BH35 Manual Pot Wash (30 ml/L), rinse with water, air dry.
BH30 sanitizer (200–500 ppm), contact time 2–3 minutes, wipe, air dry.
